name: RPlog_Futile_Research_-_Presentation
title: Futile Research: Presentation
summary: Aboard the refugee transport Expedient 3, Luke Skywalker seeks out the young wards of the New Republic and finds Arise Omondra apart from the others, nose buried in a datapad and needled by a group of teasing teens. Drawing her aside to sit on cargo crates, Luke encourages her to share the idea he had once invited her to develop. Arise reveals she has been studying cartography and compiling lists of potential relocation worlds for the displaced Basilica children, sorted by resources versus safety, and even proposes a more organized mobile fleet so the Republic need not always flee. Luke, troubled by talk of the Navy but intrigued by her work, explains why neither Dac nor Kashyyyk can become the new heart of the Republic, then gratefully accepts a copy of her list and promises to show her the Jedi cruiser. The scene underscores Arise's earnest, precocious effort to help and Luke's quiet appreciation of it.
